message:
fix: Add utils.allocator_helper to runtime deps in incremental compiler

The runtime module re-exports allocator_helper, so it needs to be
listed as a dependency in the incremental compiler's MODULE_OBJECTS.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
